2605.10064.title: MAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution with Co-Evolutionary Knowledge Graphs
2605.10064.paper_summary: Self-evolving language-model agents must decide what to learn next and how to preserve what they have learned across iterations. Existing systems typically carry this cross-iteration knowledge as natural-language feedback, flat episodic memory, or implicit reinforcement signals, none of which cleanly supports a frozen weak backbone at inference time. This paper introduces MAGE (Multi-Agent Graph-guided Evolution), a framework that externalizes self-knowledge into a four-subgraph co-evolutionary knowledge graph. Its experience subgraph stores both teacher-written failure corrections and the learner's own past correct reasoning traces, which are retrieved as task-conditioned guidance for a frozen execution model. During evolution, the graph, a task-level search bandit, and a skill-level routing bandit are updated from the same reward stream, while the learner's backbone remains unchanged. We further provide structural analysis showing how append-only memory growth, bounded curriculum coverage, and task-filtered retrieval together support stable improvement of the retrieval substrate for frozen-learner evolution. Across nine benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, multi-hop and open-domain question answering, spatio-temporal analysis, financial numerical reasoning, medical multiple-choice, an open-world survival game, and web navigation, MAGE achieves strong performance against prompt-based frozen-backbone baselines. Ablations show that self-harvested success traces and teacher-written corrections are complementary, with success memories contributing most on reasoning-template-heavy tasks and corrective memories supporting harder composition and interaction settings.
2605.10064.paper_summary_zh: 自我演化的語言模型代理必須決定接下來要學習什麼，以及如何在迭代過程中保留所學到的知識。現有系統通常將這種跨迭代知識以自然語言反饋、平坦的情節記憶或隱性強化信號的形式保存，這些方式都無法在推理時支持一個凍結的弱骨幹。本文介紹了MAGE（多代理圖引導演化），這是一個將自我知識外部化為四個子圖共同演化知識圖的框架。其經驗子圖存儲了教師撰寫的失敗修正和學習者自己過去的正確推理痕跡，這些痕跡在凍結的執行模型中被檢索作為任務條件指導。在演化過程中，該圖、一個任務級別的搜索賭徒和一個技能級別的路由賭徒都從同一獎勵流中更新，而學習者的骨幹保持不變。我們進一步提供結構分析，顯示如何通過僅附加的記憶增長、有界的課程覆蓋和任務過濾檢索共同支持凍結學習者演化的檢索基底的穩定改進。在涵蓋數學推理、多跳和開放領域問答、時空分析、金融數值推理、醫療多選題、一個開放世界生存遊戲以及網頁導航的九個基準測試中，MAGE在基於提示的凍結骨幹基準上取得了強勁的表現。消融實驗顯示，自我收穫的成功痕跡和教師撰寫的修正是互補的，成功記憶在重推理模板的任務中貢獻最大，而修正記憶則支持更困難的組合和互動設置。
2605.10064.author: Ruiyi Yang et.al.
2605.10064.authors: Ruiyi Yang, Zechen Li, Hao Xue, Imran Razzak, Flora D. Salim
